structured.name: Show Fallback Total Cost Message
structured.objective:
To show an EV Driver a message instead of the actual total cost when the Charging Station is
Offline when a transaction is stopped.
structured.description:
When an EV Driver wants to stop an ongoing transaction, but the Charging Station is Offline. The
transaction will be stopped as described earlier. The Charging Station cannot retrieve the total
cost for the stopped transaction. The EV Driver needs to be given some message, this message
can be configured in the Configuration Variable: TotalCostFallbackMessage.
scenario: 1. The EV Driver presents IdTokenType to stop the transaction.
2. The Charging Station stops the energy offer.
3. The Charging Station shows the TotalCostFallbackMessage to the EV Driver.

requirements.definition:
The CSMS MAY configure the fallback total cost information
message via the Configuration Variable:
TotalCostFallbackMessage.

requirements.precondition:
When the Charging Station cannot retrieve the
total cost for the stopped transaction, because
the Charging Station is offline.
requirements.definition:
The Charging Station SHALL show a fallback total cost
information message to the EV Driver.

chunks.content:
# I05 - Show Fallback Total Cost Message

**Objective:** To show an EV Driver a message instead of the actual total cost when the Charging Station is
Offline when a transaction is stopped.

**Description:** When an EV Driver wants to stop an ongoing transaction, but the Charging Station is Offline. The
transaction will be stopped as described earlier. The Charging Station cannot retrieve the total
cost for the stopped transaction. The EV Driver needs to be given some message, this message
can be configured in the Configuration Variable: TotalCostFallbackMessage.

**Actors:** Charging Station, EV Driver

**Scenario:**
1. The EV Driver presents IdTokenType to stop the transaction.
2. The Charging Station stops the energy offer.
3. The Charging Station shows the TotalCostFallbackMessage to the EV Driver.

metadata.heading: I05 - Show Fallback Total Cost Message

chunks.content:
# I05 - Requirements

**I05.FR.01**
The CSMS MAY configure the fallback total cost information
message via the Configuration Variable:
TotalCostFallbackMessage.

**I05.FR.02**
Precondition: When the Charging Station cannot retrieve the
total cost for the stopped transaction, because
the Charging Station is offline.
The Charging Station SHALL show a fallback total cost
information message to the EV Driver.
